ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the device manufacturer (e.g., Apple, Samsung) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, tablet, laptop) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the device in mAh */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device (e.g., Android, iOS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chargers" (
  "charger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charger */,
  "charger_type" TEXT /* Type of charger (e.g., dedicated USB charger, Apple 1A charger) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label on the charger (e.g., 5V 1A, 5V 0.7A) */,
  "measured_current" REAL /* Measured current of the charger in Amperes */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the charger in grams */,
  "cable_length" REAL /* Length of the charger cable in meters */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the charger (e.g., plastic, metal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chargers_charger_type FOREIGN KEY ("charger_type") REFERENCES charger_characteristics ("charger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charger_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charger characteristic */,
  "charger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charger */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the charger in Volts */,
  "amperage" REAL /* Amperage of the charger in Amperes */,
  "power_rating" REAL /* Power rating of the charger in Watts */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the charger as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_chargers" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-charger association */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "charger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charger */,
  "compatibility" INTEGER /* Whether the charger is compatible with the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_chargers_charger_id FOREIGN KEY ("charger_id") REFERENCES chargers ("charger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_chargers_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power consumption entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "charger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charger */,
  "power_consumed" REAL /* Power consumed in Watts */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of power consumption */,
  "consumption_time" TEXT /* Time of power consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_consumption_charger_id FOREIGN KEY ("charger_id") REFERENCES chargers ("charger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_consumption_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., team lead, team member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "charger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charger */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_charger_id FOREIGN KEY ("charger_id") REFERENCES chargers ("charger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "charger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charger */,
  "data" TEXT /* Analytics data */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date of analytics */,
  "analytics_time" TEXT /* Time of analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_charger_id FOREIGN KEY ("charger_id") REFERENCES chargers ("charger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time of report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
